Off Calendar May-17-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-20-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement on the record.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
John G. Warner, Esq., for Plaintiff: Ruby Yeh, also present.
Terry Finch, Esq., for Defendant: Michael Krasick.
10:30 am. - Case settled and terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Settlement in the sum of $77,000.00 to be received by the Plaintiff no later then May 27, 2004. Check made out and payable to: John G. Warner's client trust account.
Plaintiff agreed in open court to keeps terms of settlement confidential, each to bear own fees and costs and to be dismissed with prejudice.
Matter is deemed settled, Trail vacated and placed on the CRC 225 calendar on July 20, 2004 at 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212 for dismissal.
